message:
fix(packs/apigateway): close safe-pattern bypass on get-*/list/etc in resource names

apigateway (AWS), apigee (Google), and kong safe patterns all used
trailing `\b` on each read-only subcommand. API, stage, product, org,
or resource names containing the subcommand keyword as a substring
would short-circuit destructive ops:

  aws apigateway delete-rest-api --rest-api-id get-rest-api-v2
      -> matched apigateway-get-rest-api safe
  apigeecli orgs delete get-org-name
      -> matched apigeecli-orgs-get safe
  kong stop health-check-server
      -> matched kong-health safe
  deck reset dump-backup-conf
      -> matched deck-dump safe

Changed trailing `\b` to `(?=\s|$)` across all 58 apigateway safe
subcommands (AWS API Gateway v1/v2, Apigee CLI + apigeecli, Kong + deck).

files.patch:
@@ -40,8 +40,8 @@ fn create_safe_patterns() -> Vec<SafePattern> {
         safe_pattern!("deck-dump", r"deck(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+dump(?=\s|$)"),
         safe_pattern!("deck-diff", r"deck(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+diff(?=\s|$)"),
         safe_pattern!("deck-validate", r"deck(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+validate(?=\s|$)"),
-        safe_pattern!("deck-convert", r"deck(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+convert\b"),
-        safe_pattern!("deck-file", r"deck(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+file\b"),
+        safe_pattern!("deck-convert", r"deck(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+convert(?=\s|$)"),
+        safe_pattern!("deck-file", r"deck(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+file(?=\s|$)"),
         // Kong Admin API - explicit GET requests only
         safe_pattern!(
             "kong-admin-explicit-get",
